sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112791" key="futw/numos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῠτ-ώνῠμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n112791.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">named from a plant</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tree,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.34</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
